title: OCCURRENCE OF AURAPTENE, UMBELLIFERONE, MARMIN, LUPEOL AND  SKIMMIANINE IN THE ROOT OF AEG MARMELOS CORREA
author: MRS. A. CHATTERJEE
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: From the root of  Aegle rnarmelos  Correa lupeol, skimmianine and three benzo-α-pyrone derivatives, viz. auraptene (geranylumbelliferone), marmin [7- (3: 7-dihydroxy-3 : 7-dimethyloctyloxy)-coumarin] and umbelliferone, have been isolated. This is the first isolation of auraptene in this plant.
steps_raw: From the root of  Aegle rnarmelos  Correa lupeol, skimmianine and three benzo-α-pyrone derivatives, viz. auraptene (geranylumbelliferone), marmin [7- (3: 7-dihydroxy-3 : 7-dimethyloctyloxy)-coumarin] and umbelliferone, have been isolated. This is the first isolation of auraptene in this plant.
